mapper.select:
select count(1) as inventoryRows, count(distinct i.product_id) as productCount, coalesce(sum(i.qty_piece), 0) as totalQtyPiece, coalesce(sum(i.locked_qty_piece), 0) as lockedQtyPiece, coalesce(sum(i.avail_qty_piece), 0) as availQtyPiece, sum(case when i.avail_qty_piece <= 0 then 1 else 0 end) as zeroAvailRows, sum(case when i.status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as disabledRows from ims_inventory i
and i.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} and i.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}

select count(1) as assetCount, coalesce(sum(original_value), 0) as originalValue, coalesce(sum(net_value), 0) as netValue, coalesce(sum(original_value - net_value), 0) as depreciatedValue, sum(case when status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as activeCount, sum(case when status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as disabledCount, coalesce(avg(case when original_value > 0 then net_value / original_value else null end), 0) as avgNetRatio from ims_fixed_asset
and enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}

select d.period_code as periodCode, count(1) as recordCount, coalesce(sum(d.depr_amount), 0) as deprAmount, coalesce(sum(d.net_value_after), 0) as netValueAfter from ims_fixed_asset_depr d inner join ims_fixed_asset a on a.id = d.asset_id
and d.period_code >= #{beginPeriod} and d.period_code <= #{endPeriod} and a.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} and d.status = '0'
group by d.period_code order by d.period_code asc limit 24

select (select count(1) from ims_unit) as unitCount, (select count(1) from ims_unit where status = '1') as disabledUnitCount, (select count(1) from ims_warehouse) as warehouseCount, (select count(1) from ims_warehouse where status = '1') as disabledWarehouseCount, (select count(1) from ims_warehouse w left join ims_warehouse_location l on l.warehouse_id = w.id where l.id is null) as warehouseWithoutLocationCount, (select count(1) from ims_warehouse_location) as locationCount, (select count(1) from ims_warehouse_location where status = '1') as disabledLocationCount, (select count(1) from ims_supplier) as supplierCount, (select count(1) from ims_supplier where status = '1') as disabledSupplierCount, (select count(1) from ims_supplier where phone is null or trim(phone) = '' or contact_person is null or trim(contact_person) = '') as supplierContactMissingCount, (select count(1) from ims_product) as productCount, (select count(1) from ims_product where status = '1') as disabledProductCount, (select count(1) from ims_product where category_id is null or supplier_id is null or unit_id is null or brand_id is null or purchase_price is null or sale_price is null) as productKeyFieldMissingCount, (select count(1) from ims_product_category) as categoryCount, (select count(1) from ims_product_category where status = '1') as disabledCategoryCount, (select count(1) from ims_brand) as brandCount, (select count(1) from ims_brand where status = '1') as disabledBrandCount, (select count(1) from ims_enterprise) as enterpriseCount, (select count(1) from ims_enterprise where phone is null or trim(phone) = '' or tax_no is null or trim(tax_no) = '' or bank_name is null or trim(bank_name) = '' or bank_account is null or trim(bank_account) = '') as enterpriseKeyFieldMissingCount, (select count(1) from ims_employee) as employeeCount, (select count(1) from ims_employee where status = '1') as disabledEmployeeCount, (select count(1) from ims_employee where phone is null or trim(phone) = '' or dept_id is null) as employeeKeyFieldMissingCount, (select count(1) from ims_customer) as customerCount, (select count(1) from ims_customer where status = '1') as disabledCustomerCount, (select count(1) from ims_customer where phone is null or trim(phone) = '' or contact_person is null or trim(contact_person) = '') as customerContactMissingCount

select count(1) as unitCount, sum(case when status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as enabledCount, sum(case when status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as disabledCount, sum(case when unit_code is null or trim(unit_code) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingCodeCount, sum(case when unit_name is null or trim(unit_name) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingNameCount from ims_unit

select u.id as unitId, u.unit_code as unitCode, u.unit_name as unitName, u.status, count(p.id) as productCount from ims_unit u left join ims_product p on p.unit_id = u.id group by u.id, u.unit_code, u.unit_name, u.status order by productCount desc, u.id asc limit #{limit}

select count(1) as supplierCount, sum(case when status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as enabledCount, sum(case when status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as disabledCount, sum(case when contact_person is null or trim(contact_person) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingContactCount, sum(case when phone is null or trim(phone) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingPhoneCount, sum(case when email is null or trim(email) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingEmailCount, sum(case when address is null or trim(address) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingAddressCount from ims_supplier

select id as supplierId, supplier_code as supplierCode, supplier_name as supplierName, contact_person as contactPerson, phone, email, address, status, concat( case when contact_person is null or trim(contact_person) = '' then 'missing_contact;' else '' end, case when phone is null or trim(phone) = '' then 'missing_phone;' else '' end, case when email is null or trim(email) = '' then 'missing_email;' else '' end, case when address is null or trim(address) = '' then 'missing_address;' else '' end, case when status = '1' then 'disabled;' else '' end ) as issueTypes from ims_supplier where contact_person is null or trim(contact_person) = '' or phone is null or trim(phone) = '' or email is null or trim(email) = '' or address is null or trim(address) = '' or status = '1' order by status desc, id asc limit #{limit}

select count(1) as productCount, sum(case when status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as enabledCount, sum(case when status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as disabledCount, sum(case when category_id is null then 1 else 0 end) as missingCategoryCount, sum(case when supplier_id is null then 1 else 0 end) as missingSupplierCount, sum(case when unit_id is null then 1 else 0 end) as missingUnitCount, sum(case when brand_id is null then 1 else 0 end) as missingBrandCount, sum(case when purchase_price is null then 1 else 0 end) as missingPurchasePriceCount, sum(case when sale_price is null then 1 else 0 end) as missingSalePriceCount, sum(case when spec is null or trim(spec) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingSpecCount, coalesce(avg(purchase_price), 0) as avgPurchasePrice, coalesce(avg(sale_price), 0) as avgSalePrice from ims_product

select p.id as productId, p.product_code as productCode, p.product_name as productName, p.status, c.category_name as categoryName, s.supplier_name as supplierName, u.unit_name as unitName, b.brand_name as brandName, p.purchase_price as purchasePrice, p.sale_price as salePrice, concat( case when p.category_id is null then 'missing_category;' else '' end, case when p.supplier_id is null then 'missing_supplier;' else '' end, case when p.unit_id is null then 'missing_unit;' else '' end, case when p.brand_id is null then 'missing_brand;' else '' end, case when p.purchase_price is null then 'missing_purchase_price;' else '' end, case when p.sale_price is null then 'missing_sale_price;' else '' end, case when p.spec is null or trim(p.spec) = '' then 'missing_spec;' else '' end, case when p.status = '1' then 'disabled;' else '' end ) as issueTypes from ims_product p left join ims_product_category c on c.id = p.category_id left join ims_supplier s on s.id = p.supplier_id left join ims_unit u on u.id = p.unit_id left join ims_brand b on b.id = p.brand_id where p.category_id is null or p.supplier_id is null or p.unit_id is null or p.brand_id is null or p.purchase_price is null or p.sale_price is null or p.spec is null or trim(p.spec) = '' or p.status = '1' order by p.status desc, p.id asc limit #{limit}

select c.id as categoryId, c.category_code as categoryCode, c.category_name as categoryName, c.parent_id as parentId, c.status, count(p.id) as productCount from ims_product_category c left join ims_product p on p.category_id = c.id group by c.id, c.category_code, c.category_name, c.parent_id, c.status order by productCount desc, c.id asc limit #{limit}

select (select count(1) from ims_product_category) as categoryCount, (select count(1) from ims_product_category where parent_id is null or parent_id = 0) as rootCategoryCount, (select count(1) from ims_product_category where status = '1') as disabledCategoryCount, (select count(1) from ims_product_category c left join ims_product p on p.category_id = c.id where p.id is null) as categoryWithoutProductCount, (select count(1) from ims_brand) as brandCount, (select count(1) from ims_brand where status = '1') as disabledBrandCount, (select count(1) from ims_brand b left join ims_product p on p.brand_id = b.id where p.id is null) as brandWithoutProductCount

select c.id as categoryId, c.category_code as categoryCode, c.category_name as categoryName, c.parent_id as parentId, c.status, count(p.id) as productCount, case when count(p.id) = 0 then 'no_product' when c.status = '1' then 'disabled' else 'ok' end as issueType from ims_product_category c left join ims_product p on p.category_id = c.id group by c.id, c.category_code, c.category_name, c.parent_id, c.status order by issueType desc, productCount asc, c.id asc limit #{limit}

select b.id as brandId, b.brand_code as brandCode, b.brand_name as brandName, b.status, count(p.id) as productCount, case when count(p.id) = 0 then 'no_product' when b.status = '1' then 'disabled' else 'ok' end as issueType from ims_brand b left join ims_product p on p.brand_id = b.id group by b.id, b.brand_code, b.brand_name, b.status order by issueType desc, productCount asc, b.id asc limit #{limit}

select count(1) as enterpriseCount, sum(case when status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as enabledCount, sum(case when status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as disabledCount, sum(case when legal_person is null or trim(legal_person) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingLegalPersonCount, sum(case when phone is null or trim(phone) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingPhoneCount, sum(case when tax_no is null or trim(tax_no) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingTaxNoCount, sum(case when bank_name is null or trim(bank_name) = '' or bank_account is null or trim(bank_account) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingBankInfoCount, sum(case when address is null or trim(address) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingAddressCount from ims_enterprise

select id as enterpriseId, enterprise_code as enterpriseCode, enterprise_name as enterpriseName, legal_person as legalPerson, phone, tax_no as taxNo, bank_name as bankName, bank_account as bankAccount, address, status, concat( case when legal_person is null or trim(legal_person) = '' then 'missing_legal_person;' else '' end, case when phone is null or trim(phone) = '' then 'missing_phone;' else '' end, case when tax_no is null or trim(tax_no) = '' then 'missing_tax_no;' else '' end, case when bank_name is null or trim(bank_name) = '' or bank_account is null or trim(bank_account) = '' then 'missing_bank_info;' else '' end, case when address is null or trim(address) = '' then 'missing_address;' else '' end, case when status = '1' then 'disabled;' else '' end ) as issueTypes from ims_enterprise where legal_person is null or trim(legal_person) = '' or phone is null or trim(phone) = '' or tax_no is null or trim(tax_no) = '' or bank_name is null or trim(bank_name) = '' or bank_account is null or trim(bank_account) = '' or address is null or trim(address) = '' or status = '1' order by status desc, id asc limit #{limit}

select count(1) as employeeCount, sum(case when e.status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as enabledCount, sum(case when e.status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as disabledCount, sum(case when e.phone is null or trim(e.phone) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingPhoneCount, sum(case when e.dept_id is null then 1 else 0 end) as missingDeptCount, sum(case when e.dept_id is not null and d.dept_id is null then 1 else 0 end) as invalidDeptCount from ims_employee e left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = e.dept_id

select e.dept_id as deptId, coalesce(d.dept_name, concat('dept#', e.dept_id)) as deptName, count(1) as employeeCount, sum(case when e.status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as enabledCount, sum(case when e.status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as disabledCount, sum(case when e.phone is null or trim(e.phone) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingPhoneCount from ims_employee e left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = e.dept_id group by e.dept_id, d.dept_name order by employeeCount desc, e.dept_id asc limit #{limit}

select e.id as employeeId, e.employee_code as employeeCode, e.employee_name as employeeName, e.dept_id as deptId, d.dept_name as deptName, e.phone, e.status, concat( case when e.phone is null or trim(e.phone) = '' then 'missing_phone;' else '' end, case when e.dept_id is null then 'missing_dept;' else '' end, case when e.dept_id is not null and d.dept_id is null then 'invalid_dept;' else '' end, case when e.status = '1' then 'disabled;' else '' end ) as issueTypes from ims_employee e left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = e.dept_id where e.phone is null or trim(e.phone) = '' or e.dept_id is null or (e.dept_id is not null and d.dept_id is null) or e.status = '1' order by e.status desc, e.id asc limit #{limit}

select count(1) as customerCount, sum(case when status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as enabledCount, sum(case when status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as disabledCount, sum(case when contact_person is null or trim(contact_person) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingContactCount, sum(case when phone is null or trim(phone) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingPhoneCount, sum(case when email is null or trim(email) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingEmailCount, sum(case when address is null or trim(address) = '' then 1 else 0 end) as missingAddressCount from ims_customer

select id as customerId, customer_code as customerCode, customer_name as customerName, contact_person as contactPerson, phone, email, address, status, concat( case when contact_person is null or trim(contact_person) = '' then 'missing_contact;' else '' end, case when phone is null or trim(phone) = '' then 'missing_phone;' else '' end, case when email is null or trim(email) = '' then 'missing_email;' else '' end, case when address is null or trim(address) = '' then 'missing_address;' else '' end, case when status = '1' then 'disabled;' else '' end ) as issueTypes from ims_customer where contact_person is null or trim(contact_person) = '' or phone is null or trim(phone) = '' or email is null or trim(email) = '' or address is null or trim(address) = '' or status = '1' order by status desc, id asc limit #{limit}
